title: Noor ul-Ummah Relief Society — Zakat Eligibility Registration
story: Noor ul-Ummah Relief Society has been delivering food parcels, clean water, and emergency shelter to flood-displaced families across Sindh and Khyber Pakhtunkhwa since 2019. We are seeking formal Zakat-eligible status to expand our operations and allow donors to contribute from their obligatory Zakat. Our registration under the Societies Registration Act 1860 is current and active; however, we are in the process of obtaining the tax-exemption certificate from the Federal Board of Revenue, which we expect to complete within the next thirty days.
